title: ipomoea indivisa
intro: Ipomoea indivisa, also known as the 'Morning Glory', is a flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea indivisa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can help protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. Herbal preparations of Ipomoea indivisa can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
